Agent-first job hunt CLI

boss-agent-cli

BOSS 直聘 dual-sided workflow for AI agents. Structured JSON, recruiter ops, welfare filtering, and local-first automation.

33 top-level commands · 7 recruiter subcommands · 49 MCP tools · 1119 tests
v1.11.0
Release
JSON
stdout only
agent workflow
$ boss hr reply "你好，方便聊一下岗位吗？"
Core workflow Dual-sided
Job-seeker
Search, welfare filtering, greet/apply, chat summary, pipeline, digest, shortlist, AI resume optimization.
Recruiter
Applications, candidate search, recruiter chat, resume request, direct reply, and job online/offline management.
Delivery surface
Skill install, MCP server, Python SDK, and CLI-first subprocess orchestration with stdout JSON only.
Topics Discoverability
ai-agent mcp job-search resume recruiter-workflow python
